Lectures

Published

Feb 12, 2026

Note: password for files is provided on class piazza discussion board

Week 1: Introduction to Health Geography and GIS

  • Monday, Jan 13, 2025

  • Wednesday, Jan 15, 2025

Week 2/3: Foundational concepts in Geography and GIS, Spatial Data, Coordinate Systems

  • Foundational concepts in Geography and GIS

  • Spatial Data fundamentals

  • Projections and Coordinate System fundamentals

Week 4: Spatial Health Data

  • Spatial Health Data

  • Data Quality and Metadata

Week 5: Geocoding and Joins, Data Integration

  • Geocoding and Joins

  • Data Integration

Week 6: Mapping Health data

  • Mapping Health Data

  • Map Composition and Design

Week 7: Queries, Field Calculations, Patterns and Processes

  • Queries and Field Calculations

  • Introduction to Spatial Variation and Clustering

Week 8: Spatial Neighbors, Spatial Clustering

  • Spatial Neighbors

  • Spatial Clustering I: Attributes

Week 9: Spatial Clustering and Grouping, Patterns and Processes

  • Spatial Clustering: Scan-based clustering

  • Patterns & Processes

  • Grouping and Regionalization (supplemental slides)

Week 11: Environmental Hazards, Spatial Interpolation, Rasters

  • Environmental Hazards

  • Spatial Interpolation

Week 12: Disease Diffusion, Disease Ecology, Regrssion

  • Disease Diffusion

  • Supplemental lecture: Vaccines and Agent-based modeling

  • Introduction to Regression

Week 13: Spatial Regrssion

  • Regression: Part 2

  • Spatial Regression

Week 14: Access to Health Care, Locating Healthcare Services

  • Access to Health Care, Network Analysis

  • Spatial Interaction Models

  • Healthcare Utilization
